title: Delhi High Court restrains Drishyam 3 producer from creating third-party OTT rights on Amazon Prime's plea
description: The Delhi High Court recently granted relief to Amazon Prime Video and restrained Malayalam actor Mohanlal's production house, Aashirwad Cinemas, from entering into any agreement with any other party for creating over-the-top (OTT) rights in the Drishyam movie franchise [Amazon Seller Services Pvt Ltd Vs Aashirvad Cinemas & Ors].In an ex-parte order passed on April 7, Justice Harish Vaidyanathan Shankar protected the commercial interest of Amazon Seller Services (which owns and operates Amaz
